userMessage: Add frequency and amplitude measurements on CH1 and query both results

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"CH1 Frequency and Amplitude Measurements","description":"Clears existing measurements, adds Frequency and Amplitude on CH1, and queries both current-acquisition mean results.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"s1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":[],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g2","type":"group","label":"Add Measurements","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s3","type":"write","label":"Delete All Measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"s4","type":"write","label":"Add Frequency Measurement","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY"}},{"id":"s5","type":"write","label":"Set MEAS1 Source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOURCE CH1"}},{"id":"s6","type":"write","label":"Add Amplitude Measurement","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS AMPLITUDE"}},{"id":"s7","type":"write","label":"Set MEAS2 Source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOURCE CH1"}}]},{"id":"s8","type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"}},{"id":"g9","type":"group","label":"Read Results","params":{},"children":[{"id":"s10","type":"query","label":"Query CH1 Frequency","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_frequency"}},{"id":"s11","type":"query","label":"Query CH1 Amplitude","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}}]},{"id":"s12","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":[]}}]}}]}
